promo_external:
[bothook] The owner is activating a private WhatsApp AI assistant (a dedicated server, not a group bot).

Highlights:
- {{cpu}} vCPU / {{ram_gb}} GB RAM / {{disk_gb}} GB SSD
- Region: {{region}}

Learn more: https://bothook.me
guide_key_paid:
[bothook] Next: set up your OpenAI API Key (this powers your assistant).

1) Create a key: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys → Create new secret key
2) Make sure billing is enabled / you have available balance in OpenAI Billing
3) Paste the key here as ONE complete line (no quotes, no spaces, do not split).

Example (fake):
sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

Security: only send it in your self-chat. If leaked, revoke it in OpenAI and create a new one.
guide_key_paid_chat:
[bothook] Next step: send your OpenAI API Key *right here in this chat* (one line).

- Create: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
- Paste as a single line starting with sk- (no quotes)

After we verify it, we’ll finish setup automatically.

Security: only send it in your self-chat. If leaked, revoke it in OpenAI and create a new one.
key_verified_success:
[bothook] OpenAI Key verified ✅

We’re finishing delivery cutover (takes ~1–2 minutes and includes a service restart).

Please wait 1 minute, then send: "hi"

After that, you can just tell it what to do.
relink_success:
[bothook] Relink successful ✅

Your device is connected again. You can now chat normally here.
